system_description: Enterprise resource planning system covering finance, procurement, inventory and production planning
Quality management system for document control, change management and CAPA tracking
Manufacturing execution system managing production orders, batch records and shop-floor data
Laboratory information management system for sample tracking, test results and analytical instruments
Regulatory affairs and deviation management system for GMP compliance tracking
Customer relationship management for sales and key account interactions with distributors and hospitals
Corporate productivity suite including Exchange Online email, Teams, SharePoint and OneDrive
On-premises identity and access management for all corporate user accounts and group policies
Corporate LAN/WAN and Wi-Fi infrastructure covering the Bucharest manufacturing site and offices
Enterprise backup and disaster recovery platform for all on-premises servers and VMs
On-premises server virtualisation platform hosting all internal application workloads
Travel and expense management system for employee expense claims and travel bookings
Human capital management system for employee records, payroll, performance and recruitment
Business intelligence and reporting platform connected to SAP ERP and manufacturing data
SCADA system monitoring and controlling the pharmaceutical manufacturing production lines
Enterprise asset management for maintenance scheduling, work orders and equipment lifecycle
Business process modelling and documentation tool for GMP process maps and SOPs
IT service management system for helpdesk ticketing, change and incident management
In-house warehouse management system tracking raw material and finished goods inventory locations
Electronic signature platform for contracts, quality documents and regulatory submissions
Regulatory information management for submission planning, dossier authoring and health authority tracking
IoT-based temperature and humidity monitoring for cold storage warehouses and cleanrooms
Time and attendance system integrated with factory shift patterns and payroll
Enterprise content management for archiving GMP batch records, regulatory correspondence and legal contracts
AI-powered cybersecurity threat detection and network anomaly monitoring
Security information and event management platform for log aggregation and security alerting
Chromatography data system managing HPLC and GC instrument data for analytical QC testing
Inbound marketing, campaign management and lead tracking platform
Engineering design tool for facility layout, piping diagrams and cleanroom schematics
Source control, CI/CD pipelines and agile project tracking for internal software development
